text:

Author: jbeich

Log:
  x11-wm/hikari: drop unused dependencies

  - libepoll-shim is used by graphics/wayland instead
  - glib20 is auto-added via USE_GNOME due to being part of pango API

  Approved by:	Alexander Sieg (maintainer)
